original_image_tags: A line graph plotting "Percent in 5-deg sector (%)" on a logarithmic y-axis (ranging from 0.1 to 100) against "Angle From Flight Path (deg)" on a linear x-axis (ranging from 0 to 180). The graph contains multiple curves representing different simulation parameters. A text overlay provides the legend and parameters.

elements.description: Line graph titled 'Atlas IIAS Random-Attitude Failures through 280 sec'. The y-axis is labeled 'Percent in 5-deg sector (%)' with a logarithmic scale from 0.1 to 100. The x-axis is labeled 'Angle From Flight Path (deg)' with a linear scale from 0 to 180. A legend indicates 'Breakup q-alpha in deg-lb/ft²' with four marker types: triangle ('no breakup'), filled circle ('20,000'), open circle ('10,000'), and open square ('5,000'). A second legend section lists four line styles for 'B = 100,000' with values 'A = 3.40' (solid), 'A = 4.30' (short dash), 'A = 4.75' (long dash), and 'A = 5.00' (dash-dot). The graph contains eight data curves. The caption below reads 'Figure 11. Atlas IIAS Simulation Results with B = 100,000'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions correctly identify the same chart type, axes, labels, and scale, but Description B provides specific title, legend, and caption details that Description A omits without contradiction.
